---
title: "Taha Ziad"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: file-pdf
      text: Resume
      href: resume.pdf
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/taha-ziad
    - icon: headphones
      text: SoundCloud
      href: https://soundcloud.com/ztaha
    - icon: camera
      text: VSCO
      href: https://vsco.co/tahaziad/gallery
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:taha.ziad.business@gmail.com
---

I think the best way to use Machine Learning is to leverage intuition to find elegant solutions. Above is a collection of rather simple projects that illustrate that solutions that are tangible exist for nebulous domains. 
A lot of what I do is for games, they are easy to get data for and their abstractions make for good analogies that can translate to many other domains.

I also make music and do a little film photography. 

<iframe width="100%" height="166" scrolling="no" frameborder="no" allow="autoplay" src="https://w.soundcloud.com/player/?url=https%3A//api.soundcloud.com/tracks/1770932560&color=%23ff5500&auto_play=false&hide_related=false&show_comments=true&show_user=true&show_reposts=false&show_teaser=true"></iframe>
